The '''''maitrakh''''' of [[clan Kihm'bar]] was the leader of [[Khabarakh]]'s family in clan Kihm'bar during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. She was born during or before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and grew up after the devastation of [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]], but she was old enough at the time of the crash of the ''[[Gahenna]]'' to remember the smell of the [[Kholm-grass|''kholm''-grass]] prior to its replacement with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] hybrid.<ref name="DFR" />

By [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> she had become a ''[[maitrakh]]'' and was presented with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] when her thirdson, Khabarakh, came back from his failed commando mission with [[Imperial Noghri Commando Team 22]]. Although she was at first hesitant to listen to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Council]]or, the maitrakh did extend her thirdson's promise of protection to her, and eventually became an ally of the former [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] when she helped disillusion the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] people about their enslavement to the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] and the Empire. The Maitrakh had lost her son, grandson and almost her great-grandson to the Imperial cause which helped pursuade her to help Leia.<ref name="DFR" />

==Personality and traits==
The ''maitrakh'' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] with dark [[Color/Legends|gray]] skin<ref name="DFR" /> and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="DFR3" /> The dark color of her skin indicated her advanced age, in contrast with the light gray skin of Noghri youth.<ref name="DFR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''maitrakh'' of clan Kihm'bar first appeared in the [[1992]] novel ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', the second volume in [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|''The Thrawn Trilogy'']] by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="DFR" />
